predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_passport
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid passport.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

predicates.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the person's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: criterion_1_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: criterion_2_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents, or committed fraud or used other unlawful means, in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

predicates.name: criterion_4a_non_compliance_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_4b_non_compliance_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_4c_non_compliance_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: criterion_4d_non_compliance_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: criterion_4e_non_compliance_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_6_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after being subject to a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed the fact that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an application for international protection.

predicates.name: criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, and those applications gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in a residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: criterion_10_came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
predicates.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe the person will abscond, based on one or more objective criteria from paragraph 2.

predicates.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: has_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person has illegal stay: they are an alien who does not meet or no longer meets the conditions for entry or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person is an identified alien under one of the three statutory identification grounds.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the person, established following individual examination and based on at least one objective criterion, in the context of a relevant procedure.
